what_it_does: Defines an inline SVG icon depicting a zip/archive file as a document outline with a folded corner and small zipper blocks.
observations: Uses a 24x24 viewBox with no fill and currentColor stroke.
Sets stroke width to 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Draws the document body and folded corner with separate paths.
Draws two small square zipper blocks using one combined path.
standouts: Compact file/archive metaphor using folded page plus zipper blocks.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions: currentColor, fill="none", rounded stroke styling, 24x24 coordinate space.
Uses path elements only, with uppercase SVG path commands.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present in the SVG itself.
notes: A small outline SVG asset for representing a zip/archive file.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by the consuming component?
Is the zipper meant to imply zip specifically or archives more generally?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a file-zip icon, and the SVG content depicts a folded document with zipper-like blocks.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable design-system icon for zip or archive files that adapts to surrounding text or UI color.
novelty: The archive indicator is reduced to two small square zipper cells inside a standard document silhouette.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable archive-file visual substrate: folded document outline plus internal zipper cells in a single SVG asset.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor outline SVG icon depicting a zip/archive file with a folded-corner document shape and two zipper blocks.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing zip or archive files within a design-system icon set while inheriting color from the surrounding UI.
